text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, Kitasan Black asks me to accompany
her during her dance lesson.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: One and two and, one and two and! Ooone...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Heave-ho!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Ah, darn it. I messed up again!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Yeah. I tend to get a little carried away while dancing...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
And then I end up shouting chants like
"Heave-ho!" and "Hiyah!" like I'm at a festival or
something!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
You don't exactly hear those things at concerts,
so it'll probably confuse fans if I shout stuff like
that during an actual performance...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Sigh... What do people usually do when they get all excited like that?
choice_data_list: Why not ask someone if you're curious?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
That's a good idea! Let's see... What I really want
to know is—
choice_data_list: How best to utilize these chants, right?
How best to utilize these chants, right?
How to play it cool, I'm guessing?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
That's a good idea! Let's see... What I really want
to know is—
choice_data_list: How best to utilize these chants, right?
How best to utilize these chants, right?
How to play it cool, I'm guessing?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Huh? You think I should try to make use of them
rather than hold them back? Hm, how would I do
that?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I've got you! You should just yell before and after
songs rather than while you're dancing. ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Even during Umadol concerts, you can hype up
the crowd by engaging them in a call and
response routine! ☆

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I can just turn these shouts into a back-and-forth
with the audience just like that?! Is that really
okay?!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Yeah, let me show you! ♪ Ready? here we go! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Heeeave-HO! ☆

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Heeeave-HO!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, amazing! I feel like our hearts connected,
Falco!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Riiight?! ☆ Connecting with fans is super
important for Umadols! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
By the way, Kita. ♪ Would you like to learn more
about being an Umadol? I'll teach you whatever
you wanna know! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to Smart Falcon's advice, Kitasan Black's
performance range becomes even more diverse!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
You wish to know how to control your excitement
during concerts?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Sorry for the sudden question, Flash! I was just
amazed at how flawless your performance was
when I watched your concert.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I figured you must be really good at staying
composed and keeping your emotions under
control.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Hm. If that is the advice you seek from me, then
let me see...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
First, I'd recommend that you reflect on where
your feelings of excitement stem from.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
You can't hope to solve the problem if you don't
know the cause. When do you usually find
yourself becoming excited?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: When people are cheering for me, of course!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
When I hear people shouting my name, it makes
me super happy and I just want to yell back my
thanks to them and—

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Oh!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Your desire to shout is born from your feelings of
gratitude, so perhaps you can try conveying that
gratitude in a different way.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I see! I'll try harder to express my feelings through
my dancing, then!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After learning the truth behind her emotions,
Kitasan Black's dance skills become further
refined.
